name: Beans Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the dried pinto beans in a pressure cooker until tender (about 20 minutes). If using canned beans, skip this step.
2. Add the chopped potatoes and celery to the pressure cooker and cook until the potatoes are tender (2-8 minutes, depending on size).
3. Salt to taste.
4. Remove from heat and sauté sliced onion in a pan until browned.
5. Mix the onions with the cooked beans and potatoes.
